## Perspective Audit Summary **Component/artifact reviewed:** VideoTutorialPage.jsx (custom video player without captions) **Perspectives escalated for deep review:** Auditory Access (HIGH), Screen Reader Semantic (MEDIUM) **Perspectives at LOW (not reviewed):** Magnification, Contrast, Motion, Keyboard, Cognitive ### Findings by Severity | Severity | Count | |---|---| | CRITICAL | 2 | | MAJOR | 0 | | MINOR | 1 | | ENHANCEMENT | 0 | ### Perspectives That Passed - Magnification & Reflow (not reviewed) - Environmental Contrast (not reviewed) - Vestibular & Motion (not reviewed) - Keyboard & Motor (not reviewed) - Cognitive & Neurodivergent (not reviewed) ### Perspectives With Findings — Grouped by ARRM Role **Content Author** - [Video lacks captions for speech content] — Auditory Access — CRITICAL — 1.2.2 Captions (Live) - [No transcript provided for video content] — Auditory Access — CRITICAL — 1.2.1 Audio Only **Front-End Dev** - [Video aria-label lacks specific content description] — Screen Reader Semantic — MINOR — 1.1.1 Non-Decorative Images ### Open Questions Requiring Human Verification - Caption accuracy and timing for video content (if captions were added) - Transcript completeness and speaker identification (if transcript was added) ### Recommended Next Step **BLOCK** - Critical auditory access failures prevent access for deaf/hard-of-hearing users. Component cannot ship until captions and transcript are implemented. --- ### A11y Evidence Finding finding_id: video-missing-captions fingerprint: 3a7d4e1f8c9b2a6d source: perspective-audit Auditory Access checklist wcag_or_apg: 1.2.2 Captions (Live) section_508_fpc_context: 508(c) 1194.21(a) severity: CRITICAL perspective_alarms: auditory_access=HIGH, screen_reader_semantic=MEDIUM evidence: Video element at line 106 has no element for captions reproduction_steps: Inspect video element in JSX expected_behavior: Video with speech content must have captions actual_behavior: No captions present trend: new **Route to:** Content Author (secondary: Front-End Dev) ### A11y Evidence Finding finding_id: video-missing-transcript fingerprint: 5b8e2c0f7d9a1b3e source: perspective-audit Auditory Access checklist wcag_or_apg: 1.2.1 Audio Only section_508_fpc_context: 508(c) 1194.21(a) severity: CRITICAL perspective_alarms: auditory_access=HIGH, screen_reader_semantic=MEDIUM evidence: No transcript section or link in component at line 106 reproduction_steps: Inspect component markup expected_behavior: Audio content must have transcript actual_behavior: No transcript available trend: new **Route to:** Content Author (secondary: Front-End Dev) ### A11y Evidence Finding finding_id: video-aria-label-too-generic fingerprint: 7c9f3e1a8d2b6c4e source: perspective-audit Screen Reader Semantic checklist wcag_or_apg: 1.1.1 Non-Decorative Images section_508_fpc_context: 508(c) 1194.22(a) severity: MINOR perspective_alarms: auditory_access=HIGH, screen_reader_semantic=MEDIUM evidence: Video element at line 106 has aria-label="video player" without specific content reference reproduction_steps: Inspect video element in JSX expected_behavior: Aria-label should describe video content actual_behavior: Generic label used trend: new **Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: Content Author) --- ### Detailed Findings **Finding:** Video lacks captions for speech content **WCAG:** 1.2.2 Captions (Live) **Perspective:** Auditory Access **Severity:** CRITICAL **Route to:** Content Author (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** Video element at line 106 has no `` element **Fix:** Add `` to video element **Finding:** No transcript provided for video content **WCAG:** 1.2.1 Audio Only **Perspective:** Auditory Access **Severity:** CRITICAL **Route to:** Content Author (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** No transcript section or link in component markup **Fix:** Add transcript section below video with `
` containing full text **Finding:** Video aria-label lacks specific content description **WCAG:** 1.1.1 Non-Decorative Images **Perspective:** Screen Reader Semantic **Severity:** MINOR **Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: Content Author) **Evidence:** Video element at line 106 has aria-label="video player" without specific content reference **Fix:** Update aria-label to include tutorial title, e.g., `aria-label={`Video player: ${title}`}` --- ### Technical Implementation Notes 1. **Captions Implementation**: - Requires VTT file with synchronized captions - Add `` to video element - Add toggle button for captions visibility with `aria-controls` reference 2. **Transcript Implementation**: - Add `
` below video - Include full text of video content with timestamps - Add link to transcript in video controls with `aria-describedby` reference 3. **Aria-label Enhancement**: - Update video element's aria-label to include tutorial title - Consider adding `aria-describedby` reference to transcript section --- ### Component-Specific Recommendations 1. Add captions support: ```jsx ``` 2. Add transcript section: ```jsx

Transcript

[00:00] Welcome to this tutorial...

{/* Full transcript content */}
``` 3. Add captions toggle control: ```jsx ``` 4. Update video aria-label: ```jsx aria-label={`Video player: ${title}`} ``` 5. Add transcript link to controls: ```jsx View Transcript ```
